_readme: INERT since Phase 4 (2026-07-23): the Build-AIPatrols draft builder that read this switch is RETIRED (archive/), and the map inversion made the live AIPatrolSettings.json the source of truth - so this control no longer has any effect. Locked to web:'view' and kept only as a reference to the retired map-point->patrol composition. HISTORICAL meaning below. --- ExpansionAI map-point spawn control, read by Build-AIPatrols.ps1 - the Expansion twin of DynamicAIB.common flags.useSpawnLocations. INDEPENDENT of BanditAI: this switch only governs Expansion patrols composed from map points; it never touches AIB. enabled=1 composes every 'expansion'-toggled map point into AIPatrolSettings.json as a ROAMING patrol (base + ours). enabled=0 emits the frozen base ONLY (no map-point patrols) - reversible, authored/base patrols untouched. categoryLoadouts maps a point's category token to an Expansion loadout file (filename stem under profiles/ExpansionMod/Loadouts/); unmapped categories use defaultLoadout. A point may override per-point via its own faction/loadout/count fields. Editable in the Server Files UI as 'ExpansionAI-patrols'.
